title: Production redeploy and verify /api/reviews returns JSON 200
description: Rebuild and recreate the production categorizer container from the parent Firefly Docker stack using --build --force-recreate. Confirm the stale image (predating US-0004) is replaced and that an internal container probe to http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/reviews returns HTTP 200 JSON.
notes: Execute from /workdir/firefly. Command: docker compose -f /workdir/firefly/docker-compose.yml up -d --build --force-recreate categorizer. Do not modify the compose file. Verify via docker exec categorizer node -e with a GET /api/reviews probe. If HTML 404 is returned, stop and investigate build cache / image tag.
